message:
feat: refine durability verification, integrity sweep, degraded-mode policy, add API layer and supply-chain trust cards

- connector/durability.rs: Refactored durability violation detection
  to use structured error types and improved threshold comparison
  logic for tier-based integrity checks.
- connector/mod.rs: Registers new durability sub-module exports.
- policy/integrity_sweep_scheduler.rs: Minor fix to scheduling
  interval boundary condition.
- security/degraded_mode_policy.rs: Fix to degraded-state signaling
  predicate.
- api/: New API surface layer providing external-facing endpoints
  for node health, trust status, and policy queries.
- supply_chain/trust_card.rs: Implements trust cards — portable,
  signed attestations of a component's provenance, build environment,
  and dependency graph, used for supply-chain integrity verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
